Description: Santiago Bernabeu Stadium, home of Real Madrid in Madrid, full of fans watching a football match.
The Eiffel Tower in Paris with people walking and relaxing in the park around it.
The Dome of the Rock with its golden dome shining over the old city of Jerusalem, a famous religious and historical site.
Green rice terraces and tropical trees in Indonesia, with soft sunlight over the hills.
Mountain scenery in Georgia with high peaks and a small village or church in the valley below.
Dubai skyline with tall modern towers like Burj Khalifa and bright city lights in the distance.
A calm lake and high mountains in Canada, with forests and clear reflections in the water.
Snowy Swiss Alps with high peaks and maybe a ski resort or village below.
Sand dunes and desert landscape in Algeria, with warm light over the golden sand.
A colorful street or old town in Morocco, with traditional buildings and people walking or shopping.
